sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Day One Biopharmaceuticals stock reaches 52-week high of $21.48
feed.summary: Day One Biopharmaceuticals (DAWN) stock recently hit a 52-week high of $21.48, showcasing a 201.54% impressive 1-year return and a 130% year-to-date gain, with a market capitalization of $2.22 billion. This surge is likely due to biopharmaceutical advancements and strategic initiatives, despite TradingPro suggesting it's currently overvalued. However, the company is being acquired by Servier for $2.5 billion ($21.50 per share), leading to several analyst downgrades to Neutral or Hold ratings.

feed.title: BMO Capital raises CMS Energy stock price target on rate relief
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for CMS Energy (NYSE:CMS) to $86 from $80, maintaining an Outperform rating. The firm anticipates CMS Energy will report positive first-quarter 2026 earnings, driven by rate relief and normalized operations, despite expected increases in operations and maintenance expenses. Investors are also focusing on potential large load contracts and regulatory compacts in Michigan, while InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued despite its consistent dividend increases.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price Sees March-End AUM Dip Amid Market Weakness
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ: TROW) reported a decline in assets under management (AUM) to $1.71 trillion at the end of March, down from $1.80 trillion in February, primarily due to market weakness and investor outflows. Despite the overall dip, net outflows improved from $5.3 billion in February to $3.2 billion in March, suggesting a potential stabilization in investor sentiment. The firm's significant equity exposure made it vulnerable to market fluctuations, and future AUM performance will largely depend on market recovery and improved net inflows, especially in its multi-asset and fixed-income offerings.

feed.title: Haisco Grants AbbVie Exclusive Rights to Advance Novel Pain Medicines
feed.summary: Haisco Pharmaceutical Group Co. Ltd. has forged an exclusive licensing agreement with AbbVie, granting AbbVie global rights (excluding mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macau) to develop, manufacture, and commercialize novel pain medicines. Haisco will receive an upfront payment of $30 million, with potential for up to $715 million in development, regulatory, and commercial milestone payments, plus tiered royalties on future net sales. This partnership aims to accelerate the global development of innovative pain therapies by leveraging AbbVie's expertise in neuroscience and commercial capabilities.

feed.title: Conagra Brands hires new CEO
feed.summary: Conagra Brands has appointed John Brase as its new President and Chief Executive Officer, effective June 1, replacing Sean Connolly. Brase previously served as President and COO of The J.M. Smucker Co., bringing a strong track record of leadership in the consumer-packaged goods industry. Connolly, who led Conagra for 11 years, is stepping down from his role and the board of directors.

feed.title: RBC Capital Adjusts UDR Price Target to $37 From $39, Maintains Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital has adjusted its price target for UDR (UDR) to $37, down from $39, while reiterating a Sector Perform rating. This adjustment reflects a recent analyst move as reported on April 13, 2026, by MT Newswires. Other firms like KeyBanc, Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan, Mizuho, Barclays, Truist, Scotiabank, BNP Paribas, and Piper Sandler have also recently updated their price targets and ratings for UDR.

feed.title: RBC Capital Adjusts Mid-America Apartment Communities Price Target to $134 From $136, Maintains Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital has decreased its price target for Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) from $136 to $134, while retaining a Sector Perform rating. This adjustment reflects a recent change in analyst recommendations for the residential REIT. Other firms, including Baird, Evercore ISI, Truist, Morgan Stanley, and Scotiabank, have also recently adjusted their price targets for MAA.

feed.title: BMO raises Duke Energy stock price target to $143 on growth upside
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for Duke Energy (NYSE:DUK) to $143 from $136, maintaining an Outperform rating. The firm anticipates Duke Energy will report first-quarter 2026 earnings on May 5, with investors focusing on regulatory updates and potential growth upside from data center onboarding activity. Despite the stock trading near its 52-week high, InvestingPro data suggests it might be overvalued at its current price of $131.79.

feed.title: Another Year of Ford’s Commitment to America
feed.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley reiterates the company's commitment to American manufacturing, highlighting that Ford continues to lead in U.S. vehicle assembly, exports, and hourly autoworker employment in 2025. He emphasizes the economic impact of keeping manufacturing jobs in the U.S. and announces plans for further investment and job creation in upcoming years to support new vehicle and battery production.

feed.title: DLH Holdings Corp. joins healthcare leaders for collaborative innovation event
feed.summary: DLH Holdings Corp. recently participated in the NMCSD DHA Academic Research Competition and Innovation Day, an event focused on collaborative advancements in healthcare research and operational excellence. This involvement highlights DLH's commitment to supporting research-led innovations. The company has also been advancing AI tools to unify federal data for Warfighter health and readiness, and to strengthen U.S. defenses.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc.'s long position in H-shares of Ganfeng Lithium increases to 5.7% on Apr 2 from 5.08%, HKEX filing shows
feed.summary: An HKEX filing indicates that Citigroup Inc. increased its long position in the H-shares of Ganfeng Lithium to 5.7% on April 2, up from 5.08%. This adjustment reflects a notable change in Citigroup's investment in the lithium producer's H-shares. The filing provides transparency regarding institutional holdings in the company.

feed.title: Chipotle (CMG) Unveils Redesigned Rewards Program and App Experience
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) has launched a redesigned Chipotle Rewards program and an updated app interface, available in the U.S. and Canada. The "Rewards on Repeat" initiative aims to boost customer engagement with more frequent rewards, flexibility, and gamification, streamlining features for easier tracking and offers. Despite strong profitability and growth, the company has seen $2.6 million in insider selling, which might signal caution for potential investors.

feed.title: Revvity to Hold Earnings Call on Tuesday, May 5, 2026
feed.summary: Revvity, Inc. (NYSE: RVTY) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 7:30 a.m. ET to discuss these results, featuring President and CEO Prahlad Singh and CFO Max Krakowiak. A live audio webcast will be accessible on the Investors section of Revvity's website.

feed.title: RTX’s Collins Aerospace launches PHEDRE Consortium to advance next-generation propeller technologies
feed.summary: RTX's Collins Aerospace has launched the PHEDRE Consortium to lead research and development for next-generation turboprop propellers. The initiative, supported by a France 2030 grant, focuses on reducing noise, weight, and aerodynamic impact while enhancing aircraft efficiency and passenger comfort. Collins Aerospace Ratier-Figeac aims to advance design methods, improve simulation capabilities, and elevate service offerings for propeller operators through this collaboration.

feed.title: News | Bell selects five RTX systems for U.S Army's Future Long Range Assault Aircraft
feed.summary: Collins Aerospace, an RTX business, has secured multiple contracts from Bell Textron Inc. to supply five crucial systems for the U.S. Army's next-generation MV-75 Future Long Range Assault Aircraft (FLRAA). These systems, including main power generation and cockpit seating, will enable the FLRAA to achieve twice the speed and range of the current fleet. The program emphasizes digital engineering and a modular open systems approach to ensure long-term efficiency and adaptability for the Army.

feed.title: Finacity Facilitates Increase and Expansion of Accounts Receivable Securitization Program to $2 Billion for Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG)
feed.summary: Finacity has facilitated the expansion of Bunge Global SA's Accounts Receivable Securitization Program from $1.5 billion to $2 billion. This increase also integrates the recently merged company Viterra Limited into the program. Bunge Global SA is a leading global agribusiness and food company focused on connecting farmers and consumers.

feed.title: Data I/O Announces New Vision, New Products and Services, New Look - The NEW Data I/O
feed.summary: Data I/O Corporation announced a complete transformation, including a redesigned website and new digital tools. The company is introducing an on-site Programming-as-a-Service (PaaS) offering, leveraging AI for tech support, and planning next-generation programming systems for the second half of 2026. These changes emphasize a shift towards being a comprehensive data provisioning solutions and services provider, with a focus on faster, smaller, and more reliable systems.

feed.title: 13 New 4-Star Stocks This Week
feed.summary: This article identifies 13 US-listed stocks that Morningstar analysts have rated as 4-star "undervalued" due to recent price drops, including Verizon Communications, Intuit, Automatic Data Processing, Cadence Design Systems, and Cloudflare. It explains Morningstar's rating methodology, which considers stock price, fair value estimate, and uncertainty rating, and notes that the overall US market remains moderately undervalued. The piece provides detailed metrics for the top five new 4-star stocks by market capitalization.

feed.title: Gartner predicts half of new warehouses built in developed markets will be human-optional facilities by 2030
feed.summary: Gartner forecasts that by 2030, 50% of new warehouses in developed markets will be designed as "robot-centric" facilities, where human labor is optional. This shift is driven by a less willing workforce for manual tasks, rising labor costs, and a constrained labor supply, prompting chief supply chain officers to accelerate the adoption of intralogistics smart robotics. The new warehouse designs will prioritize flexibility, efficiency, and adaptability, with AI-orchestrated operations allowing for continuous self-optimization and reduced reliance on fixed infrastructure.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc.'s short position in H-shares of Ganfeng Lithium increased to 2.85% on Apr 2 from 2.29%, HKEX filing shows
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc.'s short position in H-shares of Ganfeng Lithium Group Co., Ltd. increased to 2.85% on April 2, 2026, up from 2.29%. This information comes from a filing with the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX). The article also notes a contemporaneous increase in Citigroup's long position in the same H-shares.

feed.title: BofA Names Olena Lifset Oklahoma City President
feed.summary: Bank of America has appointed Olena Lifset as its new Oklahoma City president, succeeding Tony Shinn, who is retiring after 20 years. Lifset, previously a Global Commercial Banking market executive, will be responsible for connecting clients, teammates, and communities to the company's services and driving collaboration across its lines of business. She brings nearly 25 years of experience in commercial banking, capital markets, and management consulting, and will build upon Shinn's success in growing the company's market share and relationships in Oklahoma City.

feed.title: Hubbell sets April 30 earnings release, 10 a.m. ET webcast
feed.summary: Hubbell (NYSE: HUBB) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before market open on April 30, 2026, followed by an Analysts' Conference Call at 10:00 AM ET on the same day. Investors can access the press release, live audio, and materials via the company's investor relations sections on its website, www.hubbell.com. Hubbell, headquartered in Shelton, CT, reported 2025 revenues of $5.8 billion.

feed.title: Moderna Impfstoff (Spikevax): mRNA Pivot Beyond COVID Fuels Uncertain Path
feed.summary: Moderna's Spikevax vaccine sales have significantly declined post-pandemic, prompting the company to pivot its mRNA technology towards new applications in cancer and other infectious diseases. This strategic shift presents both long-term potential for investors and health innovations for consumers, but also carries inherent biotech risks and financial pressures due to rising R&D costs and market competition. The article highlights the importance of monitoring regulatory approvals and pipeline developments to assess Moderna's future sustainability and stock performance.

feed.title: Alphabet Stock Dips in Pre-Market as AI Spending and Antitrust Pressures Weigh on GOOG
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. Class C shares dipped in pre-market trading due to investor concerns over heavy AI capital spending, ongoing antitrust challenges, and broader geopolitical tensions. The company faces massive infrastructure investments to compete in the generative AI race, projected to be $175-$185 billion in 2026, which is pressuring near-term margins. Regulatory headwinds in the U.S. and Europe also remain a significant overhang, with market watchers anticipating more insights from the upcoming Q1 earnings report.

feed.title: RBC Capital Adjusts Invitation Homes PT to $28 From $29, Maintains Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital has adjusted its price target for Invitation Homes (INVH) to $28 from $29, while maintaining a Sector Perform rating for the company. This news follows several other analyst adjustments to Invitation Homes' price target in March, with ratings ranging from Neutral to Overweight. Invitation Homes recently announced a quarterly cash dividend payable on or before April 17, 2026.

feed.title: Datavault AI Announces Upcoming Listing of Meme Coin Portfolio and Institutional RWA Token Suite on the Biconomy Exchange
feed.summary: Datavault AI Inc. (NASDAQ: DVLT) has announced the upcoming listing of its proprietary meme coin portfolio and Real-World Asset (RWA) token suite on the Biconomy exchange. This strategic move aims to enhance liquidity and expand distribution into Asian markets through Biconomy's established presence. The TRITON token, associated with Datavault AI's tokenization agreement with Triton Geothermal LLC, is already live and trading on Biconomy.

feed.title: Visa (NYSE: V) offers Class B exchange; Makewhole obligations, May 8, 2026 deadline
feed.summary: Visa is offering an exchange of its Class B-1 and Class B-2 common stock for newly issued Class B-3 and Class C common stock, along with cash for fractional shares. The offer, which expires on May 8, 2026, requires participating holders to execute a Makewhole Agreement that entails unlimited payment obligations tied to future downward adjustments in conversion rates due to U.S. covered litigation. This initiative is part of an ongoing program to manage potential market overhang and provide liquidity while maintaining protection for Class A and Class C stockholders against litigation liabilities.

feed.title: SK Telecom Fine Challenge Trial Starts in September
feed.summary: SK Telecom's lawsuit against the Personal Information Protection Commission (PIPC) regarding a 130 billion won administrative fine is set to begin its first trial on September 17. The fine was imposed after a USIM information leak affecting approximately 27 million people, with PIPC citing SK Telecom's failure to take adequate safety measures and delay in user notification. Although SK Telecom expressed regret, they filed the lawsuit to challenge the fine, which is the largest ever issued by the PIPC.

feed.title: Xtrackers MSCI Europe Hedged Equity ETF (DBEU) Stock Price, Holdings, Dividend Yield
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth overview of the Xtrackers MSCI Europe Hedged Equity ETF (DBEU), detailing its stock price, current holdings, dividend yield, and various financial metrics. As of its latest N-PORT filing, DBEU holds 404 stocks with a total value of $625.00 million, and a 1% turnover rate. The fund's top holdings include major European companies such as ASML Holding NV, AstraZeneca PLC, and Nestle SA, with recent activities indicating a trend of reducing positions in many of its top holdings.

feed.title: TRITON already trades as Datavault AI lines up more Biconomy tokens
feed.summary: Datavault AI announced upcoming listings of its meme coin portfolio and institutional real-world asset (RWA) token suite on the Biconomy exchange, targeting Southeast Asian markets. The TRITON token is already live and trading on Biconomy, associated with up to $8 million in tokenization fees and continued 5% transaction fee participation for Datavault AI. This move aims to enhance liquidity and distribution for Datavault AI's digital assets within a global context.

feed.title: Visa (NYSE: V) starts exchange offer converting Class B-1/B-2 to Class C shares
feed.summary: Visa has initiated an Exchange Offer allowing Class B-1 and B-2 common stock shareholders to convert their shares into a combination of Class B-3 and Class C common stock, along with cash for fractional shares. This is part of a larger program to release transfer restrictions on Class B common stock. The offer, which requires participating shareholders to sign a makewhole agreement, is set to expire on May 8, 2026.

feed.title: BMO Capital raises American Electric Power stock price target to $141
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) to $141 from $136, maintaining a Market Perform rating, ahead of the company's Q1 2026 earnings report on May 5. Analyst James M. Thalacker anticipates AEP's earnings call will be highly anticipated due to potential updates on capital expenditures and financing. Despite a cautious outlook from BMO Capital given the stock's year-to-date outperformance and trading near its 52-week high, the target was raised.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams stock (US8243481051): Is its paint market dominance strong enough to unlock new ups
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams leverages its strong brand, extensive store network, and diversified segments in retail and performance coatings to maintain market dominance in the stabilizing U.S. housing and construction markets. The company's business model, focused on direct sales to professionals and homeowners, allows for pricing power and consistent profitability, making it an appealing option for investors seeking resilient dividend growth. Analysts generally view Sherwin-Williams favorably, citing its market leadership, dividend track record, and execution on cost savings, positioning it as a quality industrial stock for long-term investors.

feed.title: SailPoint recognized as a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Identity Governance and Administration
feed.summary: SailPoint has been recognized as a Customers' Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights "Voice of the Customer for Identity Governance and Administration" report, receiving an overall rating of 4.8 out of 5 from 197 reviews. This recognition highlights SailPoint's strong customer satisfaction in product capabilities, sales, deployment, and support, with 96% of respondents willing to recommend the company. The company credits its focus on forward-looking partnerships and offerings like Agent Identity Security and Success Acceleration Service Packages for this achievement.

feed.title: Supermicro Introduces Compact, Energy-Efficient Systems to Accelerate Adoption of Intelligent Edge AI
feed.summary: Supermicro has launched a new family of compact, energy-efficient systems powered by AMD EPYC™ 4005 series processors, designed to accelerate AI inferencing and general-purpose workloads at the edge. These systems are optimized for space and power-constrained environments across various industries, offering enhanced performance, security features like TPM 2.0 and AMD SEV, and remote management. The new products include mini-1U box, short-depth 1U rackmount, and slim tower form factors to support intelligent applications at scale while lowering TCO.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Corp. (OTIS) Acquires Majority Stake in WeMaintain to Enhance Service Offerings
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corp. (OTIS) has acquired a majority stake in WeMaintain, a company specializing in technology-driven elevator and escalator services, to enhance its service offerings through digital innovations. This strategic move aims to integrate WeMaintain's IoT and AI-based solutions to meet customer expectations for real-time performance and reliability. Despite the positive outlook and a strong GF Score™ of 81, recent insider selling of $16.8 million in OTIS shares may be a point of concern for investors.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide (NYSE:OTIS) Coverage Initiated by Analysts at Evercore
feed.summary: Evercore has initiated coverage on Otis Worldwide (NYSE:OTIS) with an "outperform" rating and a $100.00 price target, suggesting a potential upside of 25.08%. This new coverage comes amidst other analyst adjustments, with some downgrading the stock while the average target price remains around $98.90. Insider transactions show recent stock sales by company executives, further detailing the current financial landscape of Otis Worldwide.

feed.title: Evercore Initiates Coverage on Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI)
feed.summary: Evercore has initiated coverage on Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI) with an "in-line" rating and a $155 price target, suggesting a 9% upside. Johnson Controls recently exceeded its Q1 earnings and revenue estimates and provided positive FY2026 EPS guidance. The company holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with institutional investors owning approximately 90% of its shares.

feed.title: RBC Capital Adjusts Essex Property Trust Price Target to $282 From $285, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital has adjusted its price target for Essex Property Trust (ESS) to $282, down from $285, while reconfirming an Outperform rating for the stock. The report, published by MT Newswires, indicates a slight revision in the target price by the analyst firm. This news comes amidst other recent analyst adjustments for Essex Property Trust from firms like Evercore ISI, JPMorgan, Barclays, Mizuho, Scotiabank, and BNP Paribas.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman and U.S. Air Force Accelerate Sentinel Program Momentum
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman and the U.S. Air Force are making significant progress on the Sentinel program, aiming for a first flight in 2027 and initial operational capability in the early 2030s. The program focuses on rapidly developing and fielding the new intercontinental ballistic missile system, which will replace the Minuteman III, through advanced digital design, rigorous testing of hardware and infrastructure, and a transformed acquisition approach. This initiative involves a vast industrial base and substantial investment to ensure enhanced strategic deterrence.

feed.title: Supermicro Introduces Compact, Energy-Efficient Systems to Accelerate Adoption of Intelligent Edge AI
feed.summary: Supermicro has launched a new series of compact, energy-efficient systems powered by AMD EPYC 4005 series processors, designed to accelerate intelligent Edge AI adoption. These systems are optimized for real-time inferencing and general-purpose workloads in space and power-constrained environments across various sectors like retail, manufacturing, and healthcare. The platforms offer enhanced security features, remote management, and reduced power consumption, aiming to lower the total cost of ownership for edge deployments.

feed.title: This NXP Semiconductors Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Monday
feed.summary: Several top Wall Street analysts have downgraded their ratings for key companies, including NXP Semiconductors, Parsons Corp, and Replimune Group Inc. B of A Securities downgraded NXP Semiconductors from Buy to Neutral, while Baird and HC Wainwright & Co. issued downgrades for Parsons Corp and Replimune Group, respectively. Raymond James also downgraded Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co.

feed.title: Cytokinetics Inc stock (US2328281044): Does cardiac muscle therapy execution now define its biotech
feed.summary: Cytokinetics Inc. (US2328281044) is a clinical-stage biopharma company focused on developing drugs that modulate contractile proteins to treat heart conditions like hypertrophic cardiomyopathy and heart failure. The company's strategy involves advancing a pipeline of myosin inhibitors and activators, with its lead candidate, Camzyos, already approved for obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy. Cytokinetics aims for label expansions for Camzyos and is progressing with other compounds like aficamten, targeting a significant market in cardiovascular and neuromuscular disorders through partnerships and data-driven development, positioning it for potential breakthrough success despite regulatory and trial risks.

feed.title: A 2.5L server and two more: Supermicro pushes AI to stores and clinics
feed.summary: Supermicro has launched a new family of compact, energy-efficient edge AI systems powered by AMD EPYC 4005 series processors. These systems, available in mini-1U box, short-depth 1U, and slim tower form factors, are designed to accelerate AI inferencing and general-purpose workloads in various space- and power-constrained environments like retail, manufacturing, and healthcare. The release aims to extend Supermicro's AI portfolio into edge deployments, supporting applications such as real-time analytics and in-store intelligence.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Announces Results of Tender Offers
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy, Inc. announced the results of its tender offers for its 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052. A total of $776,763,000.00 aggregate principal amount of Notes were validly tendered by the expiration date, with an additional $35,919,000.00 subject to guaranteed delivery procedures. The Company expects to accept and pay for these notes on April 13 and April 15, 2026, respectively.

feed.title: $776.8M in Diamondback bonds tendered before cash payout begins
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy announced the results of its tender offers for its 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052. The company received valid tenders for $776.76 million in aggregate principal, excluding an additional $35.92 million under guaranteed delivery procedures. Settlement for valid tenders is expected on April 13, 2026, with guaranteed deliveries settling on April 15, 2026.

feed.title: Activist Investor Withdraws Demand for Board Change at CoStar Group
feed.summary: Activist investor Daniel Loeb, founder of Third Point LLC, has withdrawn his demand for a board change at CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) and sold his entire stake in the company. Loeb's decision came after realizing he couldn't force CoStar to focus solely on its core business, despite earlier criticizing CEO Andy Florance's leadership and the company's "abysmal stock performance." Third Point was among CoStar's largest investors at one point.

feed.title: One in 4 Americans say owning a home feels out of reach in 2026
feed.summary: A KeyBank survey reveals that 25% of Americans feel homeownership is out of reach in 2026, while 13% believe it's attainable. The survey highlights the importance of financial education, down payment assistance, and early banker guidance as critical tools to improve readiness and make homeownership achievable. KeyBank emphasizes practical steps such as clarifying finances, exploring assistance programs, and engaging with a banker 12–18 months in advance, framing homeownership as a multi-year plan rather than an immediate goal.

feed.title: Calavo Growers amends dividend record date; $0.20/share payable April 29
feed.summary: Calavo Growers (CVGW) has amended the record date for its $0.20 per share quarterly cash dividend to April 24, 2026, though the payment amount and date of April 29, 2026 remain unchanged. This adjustment was made to comply with Nasdaq's notice requirements for dividend actions. The original SEC filing from April 13, 2026, details these changes.

feed.title: RBC Capital Adjusts Camden Property Trust PT to $104 From $108, Maintains Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital has lowered its price target for Camden Property Trust (NYSE: CPT) to $104 from $108, while maintaining a "Sector Perform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst recent news for the residential REIT, including an impending class-action settlement and changes to its senior leadership team. Several other financial institutions, including Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan, Barclays, Scotiabank, and BNP Paribas, have also recently adjusted their price targets for Camden Property Trust.
